title: OP Grass
description: Short and Tall Grass drop OP Loot!
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to another of my OP datapacks! In this pack, Grass and Tall Grass has a chance of dropping OP Loot! The drop chance is about the same as normal Wheat Seed drop... Also, if you use Shears, it still drops Grass and Tall Grass as it should.

When chopping down Grass and Tall Grass, instead of getting Wheat Seeds, you'll get 1 of the following:

-Diamond Blocks 32-64
-Iron Blocks 32-64
-Amethyst Blocks 32-64
-Netherite Blocks 32-64
-Emerald Blocks 32-64
-Obsidian 32-64
-Shulker Shell
-Enchanted Golden Apples 16-32
-Ender Pearls 1-16
-Ender Eyes 1-16
-Exp Bottles 32-64
-Totem of Undying
-High Enchanted Weapons (From Wood to Netherite)
-High Enchanted Tools (From Wood to Netherite)
-High Enchanted Armor (From Leather to Netherite)
-High Enchanted Chainmail Armor
-Enchanted Elytra
-High Enchanted Bows and Crossbows
-High Enchanted Tridents
-Enchanted Shield
-Random Enchanted Books
-Different Armor Templates
-Different Sherds
